facebook.caption: Chuồn Chuồn Bistro & Bar sits right on Trần Hưng Đạo, Phu Quoc's most lively strip, and with over 6,000 reviews averaging 4.3 out of 5, it has clearly won a loyal crowd. The bistro format means you get proper food alongside your drinks, so you can settle in for the whole evening rather than hunting for a separate dinner spot. Come around sunset when the street comes alive, grab a seat, and let the night take its time. Practical tip: it gets busy, so arriving early secures the best table.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the tables fill up as the sun drops over Trần Hưng Đạo. Chuồn Chuồn Bistro & Bar is one of those spots where the drinks, the food, and the crowd all arrive at once, and the evening just flows from there. Over 6,000 guests have given it a 4.3, and the vibe in these clips shows exactly why.

instagram.caption: Chuồn Chuồn Bistro & Bar on Trần Hưng Đạo is the kind of place you plan to stay one hour at and leave three hours later. Solid food, great drinks, 4.3 stars from 6,000+ guests. Arrive early for the best seat.
instagram.video_caption: The street lights up, the glasses clink, and Chuồn Chuồn Bistro & Bar hits its stride. This is your Phu Quoc evening sorted, food and drinks under one roof on the island's busiest strip.

tiktok.caption: One address for dinner AND drinks on Phu Quoc's busiest street. Chuồn Chuồn Bistro & Bar delivers. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocNightlife #VietnamTravel #IslandEats

video_script.hook: Best bar street in Phu Quoc?
scenes: Arrive early, best seats go fast
